channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: ‘Scammers paying to target Malaysians’: Fahmi vows crackdown on deepfake social media ads under new law
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Ministry of Communications is using the subsidiary instruments under the Online Safety...
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2)

Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The committee says Felcra has achieved only 13% of the target.

item.title: Wall St futures fall as Middle East conflict stokes inflation worries
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: World Cup ticket frenzy unfolds amid challenges
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
World Cup 2026 ticket sales were oversubscribed 30 times, despite global unrest and high prices deterring fans.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Asia scrambles for LNG as Qatar halts output due to Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US, Israeli strikes on Iran have choked tanker traffic, halted Qatari LNG output of which more than 80% exported to Asia.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Genting founder’s grandkids lose bid to expunge portions of statement
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
High Court judge Mahazan Mat Taib says the bulk of the evidence provided by lawyer Low Beng Choo, who drafted their mother’s will, does not constitute hearsay.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The iPhone 17 lineup now has a “budget” option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple’s iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Lawyers deny Anwar's claim of 'bankers, Zionists' plot in Daim family PR plan
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
They brand remarks as 'false, preposterous, outrageous.'
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: India’s Sindhu withdraws from All England Open after Dubai ordeal
item.description:

Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

Matched: court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), startup(+2)

item.title: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. The Monday decision comes after Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, appealed a court's decision to uphold a ruling that found AI-generated art can't be copyrighted. In 2019, the US Copyright […]
Matched: policy(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
According to MOH data, Malaysia’s public health care sector needs 22,435 specialist doctors by 2030, compared to 9,040 currently in service – a shortfall of 13,395. At current output, only 4,000 to 5,600 specialists would be produced by 2030, less than half the gap. The post Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Nato ‘welcomes’ Macron’s nuclear drive
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
President Emmanuel Macron says France will expand its atomic arsenal and deploy nuclear-armed aircraft to allied countries for the first time.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue

item.title: Apple’s cheapest AirPods have hit $89
item.description:
Source: The Verge
It’s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new budget phone, its entry-level AirPods 4 are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple’s AirPods 4 starting at just $89 ($30 off) at Walmart. The model with active noise-cancellation are also down […]
Matched: budget(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Nursing is more than bedside care; it is scientific, research-driven, and adaptive. Space nursing demonstrates how far nurses can extend their expertise, reaching environments once thought unreachable. The post Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool for importing data from other chatbots. These upgrades could allow users who have been using rivals like OpenAI's ChatGPT […]
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery can handle the (extreme) heat, test says
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Finnish startup Donut Lab is out to prove that its solid-state battery is all that it claims to be. Last week, the test was about fast charging. This week is where things get hot. Like the first test, this one was also conducted by state-owned VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland. The team set out […]
Matched: ai(+3), startup(+2)

item.title: Here’s the upgrade to my favorite phone camera of last year
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Vivo rarely has a presence at MWC, but this year it bucked that trend in a big way, with the reveal of its next flagship phone, the X300 Ultra, alongside an upgraded telephoto extender lens and professional camera cage. The company isn't ready to launch the handset just yet - or even reveal very many […]
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Rancangan Hamzah terajui parti baharu tak gugat Bersatu, kata pemimpin

item.title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple […]
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Mastodon now has a button for sharing content from other websites
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Sharing content to Mastodon is getting easier with the addition of a universal "Share to Mastodon" button for the decentralized social media platform. Announced on Monday, the widget allows users to share content on any Mastodon server by connecting your Mastodon account and redirecting you to the server that account is on. The blog post […]
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: You could be an influencer without even realizing it
item.description:
Source: The Verge
In late February, Puck reported on a strange case: An influencer with more than a million followers was inadvertently promoting products on Instagram. On some of Julia Berolzheimer's posts, a "Shop the look" button hovered in the corner. When followers clicked it, they were fed similar items to what Berolzheimer was wearing. Her job is […]
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch

item.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
